title: data-loader-pre-flight inputs
description: Typed inputs for the data-loader-pre-flight runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

row_count.description: Example from AGENT.md: integer Required column: 'yes'.

source_description.description: Example from AGENT.md: "NetSuite customer export, one row per account, external-id = `netsuite_customer_id__c`" Required column: 'yes'.
source_description.example: "NetSuite customer export, one row per account, external-id = `netsuite_customer_id__c`"

window.description: Example from AGENT.md: business-hours boundary ("this Saturday 2am-6am PT"); drives async sizing Required column: 'no'.
window.example: business-hours boundary ("this Saturday 2am-6am PT"); drives async sizing
